enabled.label: Enabled
enabled.help: Enable or disable Engram without uninstalling it

dbPath.label: Database Path
dbPath.help: Path to the Engram SQLite database (default: <OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR>/engram.db; falls back to ~/.openclaw/engram.db)

recallEnabled.label: Recall Enabled
recallEnabled.help: Enable proactive memory injection before prompt build

kbEnabled.label: Knowledge Base Enabled
kbEnabled.help: Enable indexing and retrieval for markdown collections

embedEnabled.label: Embeddings Enabled
embedEnabled.help: Enable optional embedding-based reranking via an OpenAI-compatible endpoint
